## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm test` locally and it passes
- [ ] I added/updated tests in `tests/unit.test.js`
- [ ] I updated the README / tool descriptions if behavior changed
- [ ] No new heavy runtime dependencies were added (or discussed in the issue)
- [ ] The honesty layer is preserved (no fabricated success for REST-impossible ops)
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or real file keys are included in the diff
